ddls:
CREATE TABLE "executives" (
  "executive_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each executive */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the executive */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the executive */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company where the executive works */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the executive */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the executive */,
  "email" TEXT /* Professional email address of the executive */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Professional phone number of the executive */,
  "educational_background" TEXT /* Educational history of the executive */,
  "linked_in_url" TEXT /* LinkedIn profile URL of the executive */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the executive's profile picture */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the executive's profile has been verified */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the executive's profile was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the executive's profile was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("executive_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_executives_company_name FOREIGN KEY ("company_name") REFERENCES companies ("company_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry in which the company operates */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the company */,
  "company_website" TEXT /* URL of the company's website */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "employee_count" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the company */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Annual revenue of the company */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the company is publicly traded */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol if the company is publicly traded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the company's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the company's record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_titles" (
  "job_title_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job title */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the executive */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the job title */,
  "is_executive" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the job title is an executive position */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the job title was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the job title was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_title_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the executive or company */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the executive or company is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the executive or company is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the location */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "search_queries" (
  "query_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search query */,
  "query" TEXT /* Search query executed by the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location searched by the user */,
  "company" TEXT /* Company searched by the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title searched by the user */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who executed the search query */,
  "search_algorithm" TEXT /* Type of search algorithm used */,
  "search_duration" REAL /* Duration of the search query execution */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the search query was executed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_search_queries_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "search_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search result */,
  "query_id" INTEGER /* ID of the search query that generated this result */,
  "executive_id" INTEGER /* ID of the executive in the search result */,
  "relevance" REAL /* Relevance score of the search result */,
  "search_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the search result */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the search result was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_search_results_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_id") REFERENCES search_queries ("query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_search_results_executive_id FOREIGN KEY ("executive_id") REFERENCES executives ("executive_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user has admin privileges */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user's profile has been verified */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user's account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user's account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "connections" (
  "connection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each connection */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the connection */,
  "executive_id" INTEGER /* ID of the executive connected to */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the connection (e.g., pending, accepted, rejected) */,
  "connection_type" TEXT /* Type of connection (e.g., professional, personal) */,
  "connected_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the connection was made */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the connection record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the connection record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("connection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_connections_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_connections_executive_id FOREIGN KEY ("executive_id") REFERENCES executives ("executive_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "messages" (
  "message_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each message */,
  "connection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the connection that sent this message */,
  "sender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sender of the message */,
  "receiver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the receiver of the message */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the message */,
  "message_type" TEXT /* Type of message (e.g., text, image, file) */,
  "message_status" TEXT /* Status of the message (e.g., sent, delivered, read) */,
  "sent_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the message was sent */,
  "read_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the message was read */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the message record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("message_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_receiver_id FOREIGN KEY ("receiver_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_connection_id FOREIGN KEY ("connection_id") REFERENCES connections ("connection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_sender_id FOREIGN KEY ("sender_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics data point */,
  "query_id" INTEGER /* ID of the search query that generated this data */,
  "data" TEXT /* Analytics data (e.g., charts, graphs, insights) */,
  "analytic_type" TEXT /* Type of analytics data (e.g., chart, graph, insight) */,
  "analytic_source" TEXT /* Source of the analytics data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytics data was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_id") REFERENCES search_queries ("query_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the payment */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Transaction ID from the payment processor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subscriptions" (
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription plan */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the subscription plan */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subscription plan */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the subscription plan */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the subscription plan is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the subscription plan was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the subscription plan was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_subscriptions" (
  "user_subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user subscription */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns this subscription */,
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subscription plan */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the subscription */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the subscription */,
  "is_cancelled" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user's subscription has been cancelled */,
  "cancel_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the cancellation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user's subscription was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user's subscription was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_subscription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_subscriptions_subscription_id FOREIGN KEY ("subscription_id") REFERENCES subscriptions ("subscription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_subscriptions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user profile */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns this profile */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the user's profile */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the user's profile */,
  "experience" TEXT /* Work experience of the user */,
  "skills" TEXT /* Skills of the user */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Certifications of the user */,
  "languages" TEXT /* Languages spoken by the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user's profile was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user's profile was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_profiles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
